title: Error installing community node via GUI
symptom: When attempting to install the 'n8n-nodes-portainer' package through the n8n GUI, an error occurs stating 'Cannot set properties of undefined'.
applies_when: Attempting to install community node from the GUI
not_this_if: Installing the package directly via command line works
Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the GUI installation process fails to properly handle the package installation, leading to an attempt to set properties on an undefined object. This could be due to a bug in the GUI code or an issue with how the package is being referenced.
fix_steps: Open a terminal on the server running n8n
Run the command 'npm install n8n-nodes-portainer' directly
Verify that the package is installed correctly by checking the logs or the installed packages list
agent_instruction: Install the 'n8n-nodes-portainer' package directly using the command line instead of the GUI.
